title: The American Revolution
further_info: Recommended Reading Michael Hochgeschwender, Die Amerikanische Revolution. Geburt einer Nation 1763-1815. München, 2016; Gordon S. Wood, The American Revolution: A History. New York, 2002; Richard D. Brown, ed., Major Problems in the Era of the American Revolution 1760-1791, Boston, 2000; Jack P. Greene, J.R. Pole, eds. A Companion to the American Revolution, Malden, MA., 2000; Charlotte Lerg, Die Amerikanische Revolution. Tübingen, 2010; Alan Gibson, Interpreting the Founding: A Guide to the Enduring Debates over the Origins and Foundations of the American Republic. Lawrence, KS, 2006.
